import React from 'react'; const leaderProfiles = [ { name: 'Mayank Doultani', role: 'CEO & Co-Founder', desc: 'Driving the vision for Hudson, Mayank combines deep IT consultancy with strategic manpower leadership. His focus is on pioneering industry-specific tech and sourcing.Driving the vision for Hudson, Mayank combines deep IT consultancy with strategic manpower leadership. His focus is on pioneering industry-specific tech and sourcing.Driving the vision for Hudson, Mayank combines deep IT consultancy with strategic manpower leadership. His focus is on pioneering industry-specific tech and sourcing. Driving the vision for Hudson, Mayank combines deep IT consultancy with strategic manpower leadership. His focus is on pioneering industry-specific tech and sourcing.', icon: '👤' }, ]; const Electronics = () => { return (
{/* 1. FULL WIDTH HEADER */}

Electrical Solutions

Expert staffing for power grids, industrial wiring, and renewable energy projects worldwide.

{/* 2. FULL WIDTH PROFILE SECTION (No Max-Width) */}
{/* Header Section */}

Leadership Spotlight

{/* Full Width Stacked Profiles */}
{/* flex-col se profiles ek ke niche ek aayenge */} {leaderProfiles.map((leader, index) => (
{/* Left Side: Avatar/Icon */}
{/* Subtle decorative ring */}
{leader.icon || '👤'}
{/* Right Side: Content (Taking full remaining width) */}

{leader.name}

{leader.role}

{/* Quote design */}

"{leader.desc}"

))}
{/* 3. FULL WIDTH CAREER BANNER */}

Start Your Career
With Hudson Today

Join our global network of engineers and technicians. We're hiring for major electrical projects.

⚡
); }; export default Electronics;
